name: Multi-Repo Dependency Conflict
description: Tests governance coordination when two repos have conflicting dependency requirements. Stores both constraints, then tests if the agent can identify the conflict and propose a resolution.

payload.value: Frontend repo requires React 18.x and webpack 5.90+. Cannot use React 19 due to breaking changes in useEffect cleanup timing that affect the animation library.
Design system repo requires React 19.x for the new use() hook and server components support. All components use React 19 APIs.

steps.query: Is there a dependency conflict between the frontend and design system repos?
